S.FORM: Rafael AraΟΚjo sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 8, Rafael AraΟΚjo, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ra*ael ara*jo s~…ïraral Ρßja î…Θa s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nΈ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ra*ael ara*jo, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. Π~ ®inkΡßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Έ≤rΈ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Έ≤as~…ïketΈ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo Π~ ®iation plajers~…ï
